base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_ladder — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Stepladder — lets Link cross single-tile water gaps in dungeons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stepladder — lets Link cross single-tile water gaps in dungeons
